title: Water Seven Turns Hostile
description: The attempted assassination of Iceburg throws suspicion across Water Seven and points toward a hidden conspiracy.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Nico Robin, Nami, Iceburg, Zoro. The attempted assassination of Iceburg throws suspicion across Water Seven and points toward a hidden conspiracy.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: First, I want to say that...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Of course, you also became an outlaw,...

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: The only living one is iceberg.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I don't care how you do it.

summary: The attempted assassination of Iceburg throws suspicion across Water Seven and points toward a hidden conspiracy.
